alkylation reagent: alkylation with iodoacetamide to a final concentration of 20 mM
alkylation concentration: alkylation with iodoacetamide to a final concentration of 20 mM
cleavage agent: overnight incubation with 2 µl 0.1 µg endopeptidase LysC
collision energy: with the normalized collision energy of 30.
fragmentation method: fragmented by higher energy collision dissociation (HCD)
instrument: analyzed on an Exploris 480 mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduced with dithiothreitol to a final concentration of 10 mM
reduction concentration: reduced with dithiothreitol to a final concentration of 10 mM
